name: workflow_start
description:
Start a WorkflowRun. The runtime materialises tasks, applies the
isolation policy, runs Test-CanStartRun against active runs, and
creates the worktree when isolated. POST /workflows/runs.

workflow_name.description: Name of the workflow to start (must match a workflow.json under content/workflows/).

isolated.description:
Isolation policy for this run. Defaults to true (the runtime creates a
git worktree and dedicated branch). Setting false runs against the main
checkout — the runtime returns 409 conflict when another non-isolated
run is active.

task_ids.description: Pre-existing task IDs to attach to the run.

task_definitions.description: Inline task definitions to materialise during the run start.

branch_name.description: Optional branch name override for isolated runs.

worktree_path.description: Optional worktree path override for isolated runs.
